extra.message: Unsanitized input from a web form flows into the return value of evaluate, where it is used to render an HTML page returned to the user. This may result in a Cross-Site Scripting attack (XSS).
Unsanitized input from a web form flows into the return value of lookup, where it is used to render an HTML page returned to the user. This may result in a Cross-Site Scripting attack (XSS).
Unsanitized input from a web form flows into the return value of xml, where it is used to render an HTML page returned to the user. This may result in a Cross-Site Scripting attack (XSS).
Unsanitized input from a web form flows into flask.render_template_string, where it is used to render an HTML page returned to the user. This may result in a Cross-Site Scripting attack (XSS).
Unsanitized input from a web form flows into eval, where it is executed as Python code. This may result in a Code Injection vulnerability.

Unsanitized input from a web form flows into flask.render_template_string, where it is used to construct a template that gets rendered. This may result in a Server-Side Template Injection vulnerability.
